news.title:
Bharti Airtel and Reliance partner with PE firms, hyperscalers to expand data centers.
This move aids scaling in high-growth areas while protecting shareholders from capital calls.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel and Reliance partner with PE firms, hyperscalers to expand data centers.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Bharti Airtel to Outperform with Rs 2310 target, citing $1bn Nxtra Data investment.
Nxtra Data aims to scale capacity from 300MW to 1GW, targeting 25% market share in $3.1bn business.
news.summary:
CLSA upgrades Bharti Airtel to Outperform with Rs 2310 target, citing $1bn Nxtra Data investment.
Nxtra Data aims to scale capacity from 300MW to 1GW, targeting 25% market share in $3.1bn business.

news.title:
Jefferies maintains 'Buy' on Sai Life Sciences; TP Rs 1,300; expects 15-20% CAGR and 28-30% EBITDA margin.
CLSA raises Bharti Airtel's TP to Rs 2,320; highlights Nxtra's $1B investment and 25% data center market target.
news.summary:
Jefferies maintains 'Buy' on Sai Life Sciences; TP Rs 1,300; expects 15-20% CAGR and 28-30% EBITDA margin.
CLSA raises Bharti Airtel's TP to Rs 2,320; highlights Nxtra's $1B investment and 25% data center market target.

news.title:
CLSA reiterates Outperform rating on Bharti Airtel, raising target price to Rs 2,320, citing Nxtra's aggressive data centre capacity expansion.
Airtel's telecom business remains resilient with ARPU growth, tariff hikes, and strong market positioning, boosting overall earnings momentum.
news.summary:
CLSA reiterates Outperform rating on Bharti Airtel, raising target price to Rs 2,320, citing Nxtra's aggressive data centre capacity expansion.
Airtel's telecom business remains resilient with ARPU growth, tariff hikes, and strong market positioning, boosting overall earnings momentum.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment for Nxtra Data, boosting its data center business. Adani Ports surpasses 500M tonnes of cargo handled, enhancing investor confidence.
PhysicsWallah reports ₹205 crore during Vishwas Diwas, up 36%. IndiGo names Willie Walsh as CEO to stabilize operations amid rising fuel costs and competition.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment for Nxtra Data, boosting its data center business. Adani Ports surpasses 500M tonnes of cargo handled, enhancing investor confidence.
PhysicsWallah reports ₹205 crore during Vishwas Diwas, up 36%. IndiGo names Willie Walsh as CEO to stabilize operations amid rising fuel costs and competition.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.

news.summary: Airtel's Nxtra plans to raise $1B for data center expansion.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment in Nxtra from Alpha Wave, Carlyle, and Anchorage.
Nxtra valued at $3.1B post-transaction; Airtel retains control, investing $290M for AI data center growth.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment in Nxtra from Alpha Wave, Carlyle, and Anchorage.
Nxtra valued at $3.1B post-transaction; Airtel retains control, investing $290M for AI data center growth.

news.title:
Nifty sees 'Death Cross' in March, with 12 stocks including Airtel, HCL Tech, and M&M impacted.
Airtel, HCL, and M&M show technical weakness; recovery potential depends on key resistance levels.
news.summary:
Nifty sees 'Death Cross' in March, with 12 stocks including Airtel, HCL Tech, and M&M impacted.

news.title:
DoT denies Vi-like relief for Bharti Airtel, Tata Teleservices on AGR dues.
Telcos must pay ₹10,000 cr by March 31; non-payment risks contempt of court.
news.summary:
DoT denies Vi-like relief for Bharti Airtel, Tata Teleservices on AGR dues.
Telcos must pay ₹10,000 cr by March 31; non-payment risks contempt of court.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel to repay ₹10,000 crore dues after moratorium ends.
The company plans repayment as per Mint's report.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel to repay ₹10,000 crore dues after moratorium ends.
The company plans repayment as per Mint's report.

news.title:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec recommends buying Bharti Airtel shares with a target of ₹2,032 and stop-loss at ₹1,684.
Nifty 50 and Sensex face a 9.5% decline this month amid geopolitical tensions, oil price surge, and rupee hitting record lows.
news.summary:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec recommends buying Bharti Airtel shares with a target of ₹2,032 and stop-loss at ₹1,684.
Nifty 50 and Sensex face a 9.5% decline this month amid geopolitical tensions, oil price surge, and rupee hitting record lows.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel to pay ₹10,000 crore in AGR dues by March 31, marking its first post-moratorium instalment.
The total AGR liability, including interest, exceeds ₹40,000 crore; Airtel seeks reassessment like Vodafone Idea.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel to pay ₹10,000 crore in AGR dues by March 31, marking its first post-moratorium instalment.
The total AGR liability, including interest, exceeds ₹40,000 crore; Airtel seeks reassessment like Vodafone Idea.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel to see inflows of USD 249M amid Nifty semi-annual reshuffle.
Rejig of Nifty indices scheduled today at 3 PM.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel to see inflows of USD 249M amid Nifty semi-annual reshuffle.

news.title:
Emkay Global retains 'Reduce' on Bharti Airtel, citing limited upside and risks from Jio IPO impacting competition and investor flows.
Africa's Ebitda upgrade supports growth, but Arpu growth concerns and delayed tariff hikes limit re-rating potential for Bharti Airtel.
news.summary:
Emkay Global retains 'Reduce' on Bharti Airtel, citing limited upside and risks from Jio IPO impacting competition and investor flows.
Africa's Ebitda upgrade supports growth, but Arpu growth concerns and delayed tariff hikes limit re-rating potential for Bharti Airtel.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel received a DoT notice alleging subscriber verification norm violations.
DoT imposed a Rs. 1 lakh penalty; Airtel plans to contest the notice.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
